nasb.text: All these were the sons of David, besides the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.

esv.text: All these were David’s sons, besides the sons of the concubines, and Tamar was their sister.

cnv.text: 他們都是大衛的兒子，此外還有他們的妹妹他瑪，以及妃嬪所生的兒子。

ccb.text: 这些都是大卫的儿子，不包括嫔妃生的儿子。大卫还有个女儿，名叫她玛。
